steps.title: Identify the key context clue
steps.content: The phrase “doesn't have a definite idea of when” combined with “This conjecture” tells us Ochoa holds a belief based on incomplete information — an educated guess about something uncertain.

steps.title: Select the word expressing an uncertain belief
steps.content: Speculates means forming an opinion without complete evidence. The other choices either frame this as a demand, contradict her motivation to research, or claim certainty despite her stated uncertainty. This word captures what Ochoa does — hold a belief about the future without knowing when. That matches choice B — B is correct.
